Name: PHYS_STATS_PER_LEVEL_STAT_PARAM
Description: Defines character statistics, attack power, resistances, and gameplay modifiers granted at each level or stat value.

Fields.Name: Level Status Value
Fields.Description: The level or stat value associated with this parameter entry.

Fields.Name: Spell Slots
Fields.Description: Number of available spell attunement slots.

Fields.Name: Spell Uses Level
Fields.Description: Determines spell usage capacity or spell cast count scaling.

Fields.Name: Maximum HP
Fields.Description: Maximum health points granted at this level.

Fields.Name: Stamina
Fields.Description: Maximum stamina value.

Fields.Name: Maximum Equip Load [kg]
Fields.Description: Maximum equipment weight the character can carry.

Fields.Name: Strength Physical Attack
Fields.Description: Physical attack power scaling derived from Strength.

Fields.Name: Dexterity Physical Attack
Fields.Description: Physical attack power scaling derived from Dexterity.

Fields.Name: Magic Attack
Fields.Description: Magic attack power value.

Fields.Name: Fire Attack
Fields.Description: Fire attack power value.

Fields.Name: Lightning Attack
Fields.Description: Lightning attack power value.

Fields.Name: Dark Attack
Fields.Description: Dark attack power value.

Fields.Name: Weapon Break Additional Effect Attack
Fields.Description: Additional effect attack power related to weapon durability damage.

Fields.Name: Bleed Additional Effect Attack
Fields.Description: Additional effect attack power for bleed buildup.

Fields.Name: Poison Additional Effect Attack
Fields.Description: Additional effect attack power for poison buildup.

Fields.Name: Curse Additional Effect Attack
Fields.Description: Additional effect attack power for curse buildup.

Fields.Name: Casting Time Correction Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting spell casting speed.

Fields.Name: Critical Attack Correction Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting critical attack damage.

Fields.Name: Minimum Variation Correction Scale
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier for variation-based corrections.

Fields.Name: Maximum Variation Correction Scale
Fields.Description: Maximum multiplier for variation-based corrections.

Fields.Name: Weapon Break Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against weapon durability damage effects.

Fields.Name: Bleed Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against bleed buildup.

Fields.Name: Poison Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against poison buildup.

Fields.Name: Petrification Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against petrification effects.

Fields.Name: Curse Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against curse effects.

Fields.Name: Magic Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against magic damage.

Fields.Name: Fire Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against fire damage.

Fields.Name: Lightning Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against lightning damage.

Fields.Name: Dark Resistance [%]
Fields.Description: Resistance against dark damage.

Fields.Name: Step Invincibility Time Ratio [%]
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier applied to invincibility frames during stepping.

Fields.Name: Rolling Invincibility Time Ratio [%]
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier applied to invincibility frames during rolling.

Fields.Name: Jump Invincibility Time Ratio [%]
Fields.Description: Percentage modifier applied to invincibility frames during jumping.

Fields.Name: Equipment Change Speed Scale [%]
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the speed of equipment switching.

Fields.Name: Item Use Speed Scale [%]
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the speed of item usage.

Fields.Name: Guard Speed Scale [%]
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting the speed of entering a guarding stance.

Fields.Name: Defense
Fields.Description: Overall defensive power value.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Ticket Count Denominator
Fields.Description: Controls item drop probability using a ticket-based system.

Fields.Name: Chest Trap Misfire Ticket Count Denominator
Fields.Description: Controls the probability of treasure chest traps failing to activate.

Fields.Name: Critical Ticket Count Denominator
Fields.Description: Controls critical hit probability using a ticket-based system.

Fields.Name: Additional Maximum HP
Fields.Description: Additional bonus HP added on top of the base maximum HP.

Fields.Name: Abyss Attack Power
Fields.Description: Attack power related to abyss-type damage or effects.

Fields.Name: Poise
Fields.Description: Determines resistance to staggering and interruption.
